title: 8 Skilling Lybsk - Christian IV (Type 3)

obverse.description: Crowned bust of King Christian IV with long hair above the a shield with arms of Denmark. Shield has curved sides and is partially within a beaded circle as well as King's bust. Legend along rim, divided in two by shield below and King's crown above.
obverse.lettering_translation: Christian IV King of Denmark, Norway of the Wends and the Goths by the Grace of God.

reverse.description: Nude female figure, representing Fortuna, is standing on a small globe, looking straight. She held a long banner with right hand above head making it waving behind her back with the left. Date is divided at sides of her legs. Fortuna and date are inside a beaded circle with legend continuous outside; value as VIII L.S. and mintmark at end.
reverse.lettering:
REG: MAIES: MO: PROVINCIALIS: VIII L. S.
16  45

comments:
Mintmark: crossed halberds.
King's figure lookalike that of km# 26 type II
